---
title: "Figure3"
output: html_document
date: "2025-04-24"
---

# Set up script
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(ggplot2)
standard_plotTheme <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 15,
      face = "bold",
      vjust = 2,
      hjust = 0.5
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 13,
      face = "italic",
      vjust = 2,
      hjust = 0.5
    ),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, vjust = 0.25),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, vjust = 1),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )


theme_set(standard_plotTheme)


# define 6 custom colors
timepoint_cols <- c(
  "#1f77b4",  # blue (replacing teal)
  "#d95f02",  # orange
  "#7570b3",  # violet
  "#e7298a",  # magenta/pink
  "#66a61e",  # green
  "#e6ab02"   # mustard yellow
)

```



MANUSCRIPT FIGURE 3
Here, we will generate figure 3 from the PARC ab initio manuscript

# Settings

## Set studyNR
```{r}
studyNR = "EUT046"
```


## Load packages
```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, patchwork, here, GGally, ggplotify, grid)
```


## Load functions
```{r}
source(here("functions.R"), local = knitr::knit_global())
```



## Directories
```{r}
inputDir = file.path(here(), "input", studyNR)
outputDir = file.path(here(), "output", studyNR)

if(!dir.exists(outputDir)){
  dir.create(outputDir)
}

plotDir = file.path(here(), "figures", studyNR)

if(!dir.exists(plotDir)){
  dir.create(plotDir)
}
```



# Load data
```{r}
load(file.path(outputDir, "WrangledInput", "WrangledInputData.RData"))

```



# Generate figure

## Figure 3a
Here we plot the accumulation of the HALLMARK pathways

```{r}
fig3a_AU = BMDaccumulationPlot_pathway(BMDoutput = AU_norm_HALLMARK_select, partner = "AristotleU") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(color = "firebrick")
  ) +
  xlim(c(0,50))


fig3a_BPI = BMDaccumulationPlot_pathway(BMDoutput = BPI_norm_HALLMARK_select, partner = "BPI") + 
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(color = "gray30")
  ) +
  xlim(c(0,50))


fig3a_GU = BMDaccumulationPlot_pathway(BMDoutput = GU_norm_HALLMARK_select, partner = "GhentU") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(color = "gold1")
  ) +
  xlim(c(0,50))

fig3a_LU = BMDaccumulationPlot_pathway(BMDoutput= LU_norm_HALLMARK_select, partner = "LeidenU") + 
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(color = "blue2")
  ) +
  xlim(c(0,50))


fig3a_SC = BMDaccumulationPlot_pathway(BMDoutput = Sciensano_norm_HALLMARK_select, partner = "Sciensano") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(color = "forestgreen")
  ) +
  xlim(c(0,50))


# generate title 
fig3a_lab = wrap_elements(panel = textGrob("Median BMC Accumulation", gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 18)))

fig3a = wrap_elements(fig3a_lab / wrap_elements(fig3a_AU + fig3a_BPI + fig3a_GU + fig3a_LU + fig3a_SC + plot_layout(nrow = 1, guides = "collect", axis = "collect")) + plot_layout(heights = c(0.5, 5)))

fig3a

ggsave(plot = fig3a, file.path(plotDir, "fig3a.pdf"), width = 17.5, height = 5.5)

```


## Figure 3b
```{r}
fig3b_cor <- GGally::ggpairs(
  norm_HALLMARK_combined_wide,
  aes(color = timepoint),
  columns = c("AU_medianBMD", "BPI_medianBMD", "GU_medianBMD", "LU_medianBMD", "SC_medianBMD"),
  columnLabels = c("AristotleU", "BPI", "GhentU", "LeidenU", "Sciensano"),
  upper = list(continuous = GGally::wrap("cor", size = 6))
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = timepoint_cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = timepoint_cols) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black")
  )

fig3b_cor_gg <- wrap_elements(full = ggmatrix_gtable(fig3b_cor))  # convert to ggplot

# title
fig3b_lab <- wrap_elements(
  panel = textGrob(
    "Median BMC Correlations",
    gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 18)
  )
)

fig3b <- wrap_elements(fig3b_lab / fig3b_cor_gg + plot_layout(heights = c(0.5, 10)))

fig3b

ggsave(plot = fig3b, file.path(plotDir, "fig3b.pdf"), width = 10, height = 10.5)

```



## Figure 3c
```{r}

fig3c_24h = BMDaccumulationPlot_pathway_highlight_combined(BMDoutput = norm_HALLMARK_combined, timepoint_oi = "24h", pathway_oi = "HALLMARK_P53_PATHWAY")
fig3c_48h = BMDaccumulationPlot_pathway_highlight_combined(BMDoutput = norm_HALLMARK_combined, timepoint_oi = "48h", pathway_oi = "HALLMARK_P53_PATHWAY")

fig3c = wrap_elements(fig3c_24h / fig3c_48h + plot_layout(guides = "collect", axis = "collect"))
fig3c

ggsave(plot = fig3c, filename = file.path(plotDir, "fig3c.pdf"), width = 7.5, height = 10.5)
```



## Figure 3d
```{r}

fig3d_24h = ggplot(norm_BMD_combined_HALLMARKp53 %>% filter(timepoint == "24h"), aes(x=partner, y=finalBMD, color = partner)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_jitter() +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "text", label = "*", size = 10, color = "red", vjust = 0.75) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("firebrick", "gray30", "gold1", "blue2", "forestgreen"),
                     breaks = c("AU", "BPI", "GU", "LU", "SC"),
                     labels = c("AristotleU", "BPI", "GhentU", "LeidenU", "Sciensano")) +
  labs(subtitle = "24h",
       x = "Median BMC") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels= c("AristotleU", "BPI", "GhentU", "LeidenU", "Sciensano"))


fig3d_48h = ggplot(norm_BMD_combined_HALLMARKp53 %>% filter(timepoint == "48h"), aes(x=partner, y=finalBMD, color = partner)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_jitter() +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "text", label = "*", size = 10, color = "red", vjust = 0.75) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("firebrick", "gray30", "gold1", "blue2", "forestgreen"),
                     breaks = c("AU", "BPI", "GU", "LU", "SC"),
                     labels = c("AristotleU", "BPI", "GhentU", "LeidenU", "Sciensano")) +
  labs(subtitle = "48h",
       x = "Median BMC") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels= c("AristotleU", "BPI", "GhentU", "LeidenU", "Sciensano"))


# generate title
fig3d_lab = wrap_elements(panel = textGrob("BMC distribution genes in HALLMARK P53 PATHWAY", gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 18)))


# combine
fig3d = wrap_elements(fig3d_24h / fig3d_48h + plot_layout(heights = c(7.5, 7.5), axis = "collect", guides = "collect"))

fig3d


ggsave(plot = fig3d, filename = file.path(plotDir, "fig3d.pdf"), width = 7.5, height = 17.5)


```


## Create total figure 3
```{r}

# fix second row
fig3_row2 = wrap_elements(fig3b + fig3c + plot_layout(widths = 10, 7.5))

figure3 = fig3a /
  (fig3b + fig3c + plot_layout(widths = c(10, 7.5))) /
  fig3d +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", axis = "collect", heights = c(6.5, 10.5, 7.5)) + plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

figure3

ggsave(plot = figure3, file.path(plotDir, "Figure3.pdf"), width = 15, height = 16)

fig3_row3 = wrap_elements(fig3c + fig3d + plot_layout(guides = "collect"))

figure3 = fig3a /
  fig3b /
  fig3_row3 +
  plot_layout(heights = c(5.5, 14, 8))

ggsave(plot = figure3, file.path(plotDir, "Figure3_v2.pdf"), width = 17, height = 22)

  

```
